docs.title: Hello! This is Zimu Xia
docs.text:
First-Year Student in Neuroscience, University of Pittsburgh

Broad Interest: Cognitive Science of Language

I am currently building a conceptual foundation in the cognitive neuroscience of language. This site serves as a workspace for organizing readings, tracking methodological questions, and mapping the intellectual landscape as I move through the first-year curriculum.

docs.title: 📌 Current Working Documents
docs.text:
• 🗺️ Map v1

A living document. My current understanding of the field's core questions, methods, and tensions. ➡️ View Framework

  • 📖 Reading Notes: Review

Synthesis of a key theoretical review (e.g., semantic control, prediction, or dual-stream models). ➡️ Read Notes

  • 📈 Reading Notes: Empirical

Deep dive into a specific empirical paper that illustrates a method or debate I want to understand better. ➡️ Read Notes
